research_basis: Temporal cognition and calendar understanding in developmental psychology (Friedman, 2008), mathematical understanding of time intervals and age calculation (Piaget's cognitive development theory), calendrical systems and date mathematics (ISO 8601 international standards), leap year calculations and astronomical principles (Meeus, 1991), chronological reasoning in cross-cultural contexts (Hutchins, 1995), time perception across lifespan development (Block & Zakay, 2008), mathematical age calculations and birthday paradoxes (probability theory - Diaconis & Mosteller, 1989), historical calendar reforms and date standardization (Richards, 1998), cross-cultural birthday traditions and temporal markers (Foley & Robbins, 2005), neurocognitive development of temporal understanding (Wittmann, 2009)
